proposed_linkage_or_removal: Ligament identities are shared anatomy. Local topics add injury, instability, or at-risk semantics only with valid predicates. Staging may reference this shared object; publication waits for canonical-hand-anatomy-backbone reconciliation.

Intrinsic hand muscles are real canonical anatomy owned by the Hand anatomy backbone. Condition topics may reference them for exam/EDX concepts without owning their full hierarchy. Staging may reference this shared object; publication waits for canonical-hand-anatomy-backbone reconciliation.

EDX tests are shared diagnostic assets; condition topics reference them but do not own complete EDX vocabulary. Staging may reference this shared object; publication waits for hand-electrodiagnostics reconciliation.
